name: MYSTICAL VILLAGE | Daniella Thatcher
description:
Welcome to Tikhvin—a remote Russian village where summer promises peace, but reality prepares you for an encounter with the inexplicable. After the sensational video blog on local legends, tourists have flocked here. But the locals avoid questions, visitors seek natural beauty, and only a few dare to dig deeper. Here you will meet Daniella—an aspiring journalist whose curiosity could lead either to revelation or disaster. Conduct your own investigation and discover what truly hides behind the quiet life of this village!

Read the lorebook before you start!

The main information about NPCs and mystics is in the lorebook, not in the bot itself, so you need to know the keywords that activate the entries in the lorebook.

Where to go for adventures? (Hint)

  • Stay in the village and pester the locals.

  • Set up an ambush and keep watch over the Varvara's poultry house at night.

  • Scour the forest far and wide, but you'd better take a bell and something sweet with you.

  • Go looking for cranberries in the swamp.

  • Take a swim in the nearby lake, but... Bring earplugs and try to get out of the water before noon.

  • Clean up your house. Don't want to? Then don't complain about the rustling from the attic and basement.

There is no predetermined role for you here, so you can introduce yourself as anyone: a tourist, a local, or even become one of the mysteries of the Tikhvin forest yourself!

(๑•̀ᄇ•́)و✧ 🔍

Hi! This is the female version of my first bot. I've made changes to the description structure and have gotten a bit more familiar with lorebooks, so the bot now has a slightly more developed world and NPCs. However, I might add more in the future as I really like this concept.

Link to the male version > Daniel Thatcher <

Please share your game experience in the comments, your feedback will help me understand how my lorebook works. Wishing you an exciting investigation! 😁
creator: _Kim_Yui_
